import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-landing', templateUrl: './landing.component.html', styleUrls: ['./landing.component.css'] }) export class LandingPageComponent { constructor(private router: Router) {} goToRegister() { this.router.navigate(['/register']); } goToLogin() { this.router.navigate(['/login']); } }
